Container.Name: Ollama
Container.Overview: CPU-only Ollama local LLM server. Serves the Ollama HTTP API on port 11434 for pulling and running open models. Use this template on machines without a passed-through NVIDIA GPU; see templates/ollama-nvidia.xml for GPU acceleration. Models are large (several GB each) and persist under the Ollama Models path — plan appdata storage accordingly.
Container.Requires: CPU-only inference. Expect much slower generation than the NVIDIA variant; suitable for small models or infrequent use. Do not expose this container to the public internet — it has no authentication.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: Ollama HTTP API port. Point clients (Open WebUI, CLI, Kind Robots integrations, etc.) at this port. Visiting it directly in a browser just returns the plain-text 'Ollama is running' health check.

Config.Name: Ollama Models
Config.Description: Persistent model store and Ollama state. Pulled models live here; back this up or re-pull models are lost on removal.
